full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me create a clean confusion matrix visualization using seaborn for my 10-class classification results
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI provided a seaborn heatmap code snippet: sns.heatmap(confusion_matrix, annot=True, fmt='d', cmap='viridis') with appropriate figure sizing and axis labels for a 10×10 matrix.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Got the basic heatmap code, customized it
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Changed the color scheme from default to 'Blues', added percentage annotations, and adjusted figure size
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: Standard seaborn heatmap — I've used this in lab assignments

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How should I explain the gap between my results and the paper's results? My (ℓ₂)∞SVM gets ~94% accuracy on digits
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI suggested several factors that commonly explain reproduction gaps: (1) different dataset — the paper uses UCI datasets while I used sklearn digits, (2) different optimizer — the paper uses CVX (exact solver) while I used subgradient descent (approximate), (3) different sample sizes and train/test splits, (4) hyperparameter tuning differences.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Suggested focusing on dataset differences, optimization method (subgradient vs CVX), and sample size. I wrote the actual explanation myself
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: These are genuine reasons — I used different data and simpler optimizer

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me format the reproducibility checklist as a clean markdown table
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI provided a markdown table template with columns for checklist items, status (Yes/No/Partial), and notes. Included standard reproducibility items like code availability, data availability, hyperparameter documentation, and random seed reporting.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Got formatting help for the checklist layout
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: All checklist items are factually true for my notebooks
